sections.text: Pressure settings are in the GregTech config under the machines section.

Setting	Default	Description
enablePressureSystem	true	Master toggle
gravityPenaltyPerBlock	100	mBar cost per block up
maxFlowPerTick	8000	Max fluid transfer per tick (mB)
minimumFlowThreshold	10	Min pressure delta for flow
burstCountdown	100	Ticks before burst
defaultPipeFriction	10	Base friction value
enableSiphon	true	Allow siphoning
maxSiphonHeight	16	Max siphon height (blocks)
siphonEfficiency	0.5	Siphon strength multiplier
